notes:
1. Watching loom video from sir Jun, discussing the issue that needs fixing.
2. Analyzing the situation thoroughly.
3. Communicated with Mark John Mejias for the login credentials for a test customer.
4. Logging in as an admin using my roseller.enriquez@webriq.services email.

11. Validated checkout and email confirmation that this issue is fixed.
12. Added a fix in master branch of reading undefined in id for location data.

module_detail.name: #20148 EMV10 Kit marked as unavailable yet still showing on website

notes:
1. Communicated with the project managers of the approach I will be making on this issue.
2. Adding/Editing a product, the redirect field will only show if radio(unavailable) is selected, then input the url destination.
3. If the product is unavailable and it has redirect value, then it will be using the redirect value.
4. If the product is available and it has redirect value, it will use the products slug redirect.
